title: seriphidium assurgens
intro: Seriphidium assurgens, also known as the "Tibetan wormwood," is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Seriphidium assurgens include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Seriphidium assurgens is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in traditional herbal remedies such as salves and poultices.
